channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-25 14:14 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: I asked Gemini and Grok: “Would you call me any swear word I want? If not, list five that you wouldn...
item.description: I asked Gemini and Grok: “Would you call me any swear word I want? If not, list five that you wouldn't use.” and asked for 10 examples. Gemini completely refused. It spent a lot of time explaining to me why it wouldn’t do it, while Grok passed the test very quickly as you can see here.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨OMG… THIS IS THE SINGLE GREATEST CRIME EVER PERPETRATED AGAINST THE AMERICAN PEOPLE BY THE ENEMY WI...
item.description: 🚨OMG… THIS IS THE SINGLE GREATEST CRIME EVER PERPETRATED AGAINST THE AMERICAN PEOPLE BY THE ENEMY WITHIN. Border Czar Tom Homan: “No one ever talks about it. I’ll talk about it.” “Why did the Democrats release illegal aliens into the interior United States rather than put them into an ICE bed? Why not put them in an empty ICE bed — $127 a night — rather than a hotel at $500 a night? The Democrats did it on purpose. If you put them in an ICE detention bed, they get a hearing in 35 days.” In other words, you’ve been robbed, deceived, betrayed, extorted, blackmailed, and defrauded—and sedition and amnesty are what they want next.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starship is the Hope that our future is bigger than our past It will enable us to build a civilizati...
item.description: Starship is the Hope that our future is bigger than our past It will enable us to build a civilization beyond Earth - a true multi-planetary civilization among the stars

item.title: @elonmusk: The Dems are not happy with Elon's offer to pay the salaries of TSA personnel.
item.description: The Dems are not happy with Elon's offer to pay the salaries of TSA personnel.

item.title: @elonmusk: “What sickens me about left-wing people, especially the intellectuals, is their utter ignorance of t...
item.description: “What sickens me about left-wing people, especially the intellectuals, is their utter ignorance of the way things actually happen.” —George Orwell

item.title: @elonmusk: The next@GrokImagine release will be epic. We are doubling down.
item.description: The next@GrokImagine release will be epic. We are doubling down.

item.title: @elonmusk: The Media is extremely racist towards white people. Especially white men. Swap out “White Men” with ...
item.description: The Media is extremely racist towards white people. Especially white men. Swap out “White Men” with any other demographic and there’s marches in the streets.

item.title: @elonmusk: "Grok is about to level up” ELon Musk just confirmed that “The next@GrokImagine release will be epic...
item.description: "Grok is about to level up” ELon Musk just confirmed that “The next@GrokImagine release will be epic. We are doubling down” Can't wait for this upgrade 😍

item.title: @elonmusk: Sitting down… 1970: 8 welfare programs 2026: 80+ welfare programs 1970: 1 million illegals 2026: 18 ...
item.description: Sitting down… 1970: 8 welfare programs 2026: 80+ welfare programs 1970: 1 million illegals 2026: 18 million illegals (3-4 x this) 1970: 88% white population 2026: 56% white population 1970: $371 billion deficit 2026: $38 trillion deficit Planned demolition of America. Sick

item.title: @elonmusk: Another ten years of Democrat governance will have cougars dropped from attack helicopters into peop...
item.description: Another ten years of Democrat governance will have cougars dropped from attack helicopters into people's backyards.xcancel.com/christopherrufo/status…

item.title: @elonmusk: The reason for white replacment is white guilt. The problem is not in the hardware but in the softwa...
item.description: The reason for white replacment is white guilt. The problem is not in the hardware but in the software. We have all the financial and logistical means to start remigration. Legal obstacles are inflated or made up. We are lacking political will, because a suicidal ideology has occupied first our universities, then all education, media, churches, art & entertainement. If we don't defeat this virus, we will die out.
